title: senecillis vellerea
intro: Senecillis vellerea, also known as groundsel, is a biennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Senecillis vellerea include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Groundsel can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
